title: capnites corsicus
intro: Capnites corsicus, also known as "Corsican caper spurge" or "spurge caper," is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating skin conditions like acne and eczema. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
